scripts.dry-run: rm -rf .dry-run-bundle && opennextjs-cloudflare build && npx wrangler deploy --dry-run --outdir .dry-run-bundle && rm -rf
scripts.db:drop: wrangler d1 execute ebextractor_analytics_db --local --file=./src/migrations/drop_tables.sql && wrangler d1 execute ebextractor_my_saved_db --local --file=./src/migrations/my_saved.sql
scripts.db:init: wrangler d1 execute ebextractor_analytics_db --local --file=./src/migrations/ebextractor_analytics_db.sql && wrangler d1 execute ebextractor_my_saved_db --local --file=./src/migrations/my_saved.sql
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:init && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:seed: wrangler d1 execute ebextractor_analytics_db --local --file=./src/migrations/ebextractor_analytics_db.sql && wrangler d1 execute ebextractor_my_saved_db --local --file=./src/migrations/my_saved.sql
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:drop && npm run db:setup
